evals.prompt: I have a raw interview transcript at /Users/jrui7/Downloads/podcast/Melanie/melanie in-person transcript.txt and /Users/jrui7/Downloads/podcast/Melanie/Melanie Zoom 1&2 transcripts.txt. The guest is Melanie Ray, a dancer from Brooklyn. The interview is in English with some Chinese phrases mixed in. Please format this into a proper Host/Guest labeled transcript and write an edit proposal with a story arc analysis. Save outputs to the specified output directory. Do NOT process any audio files — only work with the text transcripts.
evals.expected_output: A formatted transcript.txt with Host/Guest labels on every turn, and an edit_proposal.md with story arc, recommended cuts with rationale, and reorder suggestions
expectations: transcript.txt exists and contains Host/Guest speaker labels
Every speaker turn in transcript.txt starts with 'Host:' or 'Guest:'
transcript.txt includes the guest name 'Melanie' in speaker labels
edit_proposal.md exists with a story arc section
edit_proposal.md contains specific cut recommendations with rationale
edit_proposal.md estimates a target duration between 60-90 minutes
Both files are saved under the output directory

evals.prompt: I have a completed edit_decision.json at /Users/jrui7/Downloads/podcast/Melanie/podcast_output/edit_decision.json and the formatted transcript at /Users/jrui7/Downloads/podcast/Melanie/podcast_output/transcript.txt. The guest is Melanie Ray, a Brooklyn-based dancer who does wacking, vogue, and hip hop. The interview is in English. Please generate: (1) English feature article, (2) Chinese feature article, (3) English show notes, (4) Chinese show notes, (5) Instagram post with 3 caption options. Read the article style guide at /Users/jrui7/.claude/skills/podcast-post-production/references/article_style_guide.md before writing articles. Save all outputs to the specified output directory. Do NOT process any audio.
evals.expected_output: Five text files: article_en.md, article_zh.md, shownotes_en.md, shownotes_zh.md, instagram_post.txt — all reflecting the Melanie Ray episode content
expectations: article_en.md exists and is 800-1200 words
article_en.md opens with a scene or moment, not a bio
article_en.md contains direct quotes from Melanie
article_en.md has a byline mentioning 'The Try Girl' and 'Dance Chat'
article_zh.md exists and is written in Chinese, not a direct translation of the English version
article_zh.md byline references '舞所不谈'
shownotes_en.md contains a 'Key Topics Discussed' section with bullet points
shownotes_en.md contains a 'Timestamps' section
shownotes_zh.md exists and is written in Chinese
instagram_post.txt contains 3 caption options at different lengths
instagram_post.txt contains hashtags including #舞所不谈 and #DanceChat

evals.prompt: I have a formatted transcript at /Users/jrui7/Downloads/podcast/Melanie/podcast_output/transcript.txt for the Melanie Ray episode. Please generate an interactive HTML transcript editor that I can open in my browser. It should have: a left panel with all segments listed, a right panel for editing, drag-and-drop reordering, ability to strike out text within segments, a split button to divide segments, and an Export Edit Decision button that downloads edit_decision.json. Save as edit_review.html in the specified output directory. Do NOT process any audio.
evals.expected_output: A self-contained edit_review.html file with two-panel layout, drag-drop, strikethrough, split, and JSON export functionality
expectations: edit_review.html exists and is a valid HTML file
edit_review.html contains drag-and-drop event handlers (dragstart, dragover, drop)
edit_review.html has a strikethrough or strike-out function
edit_review.html has a split segment button or function
edit_review.html has an export button that generates JSON
edit_review.html contains speaker labels (Host/Guest) for segments
The exported JSON schema includes fields: id, speaker, status, original_position, final_position
